heading: Contribution to Interest Subsidy Account of Enhanced Structural Adjustment Facility of International Monetary Fund
label: 286e–12 Contribution to Interest Subsidy Account of Enhanced Structural Adjustment Facility of International Monetary Fund

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), the United States Governor of the Fund may contribute $150,000,000 to the Interest Subsidy Account of the Enhanced Structural Adjustment Facility of the Fund on behalf of the United States.

children.heading: Condition
children.label: 2 Condition
children.text: The United States Governor of the Fund may not make a commitment to contribute any amount authorized to be contributed under paragraph (1) before an amount equal to such amount has been appropriated for such purpose.

children.heading: Limitation on authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Limitation on authorization of appropriations
children.text: To pay for the contribution authorized by subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $150,000,000, without fiscal year limitation, for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
